feat.name: Banshee Cry Display
feat.text:
You’ve learned how to unleash a sudden and disruptive noisemaker at just the right moment in your display, a technique that can cause a spellcaster to fumble the phrasing of their magic. You gain the Banshee Cry fireworks display.  
  
 **Banshee Cry**

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.failure: The creature must use an additional action on the triggering action or activity, or it's disrupted.
feat.trigger: A creature within 30 feet Casts a Spell or Activates an Item using a concentrate Activation
feat.effect: You expend 1 fireworks display or 3 versatile vials to set off a firework that explodes with a loud screech near the creature. The creature must attempt a Will save
